sourceMovie.title: Despicable Me 3
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Despicable Me 3 for the same reason it broke through in 2017: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a animation rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Kyle Balda keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and animation blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Despicable Me 3 clicked for you, The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and animation, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2

faq.question: What should I watch after Despicable Me 3?
faq.answer: Try The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part, The Secret Life of Pets 2, Mulan II—each shares DNA with Despicable Me 3 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Despicable Me 3?
faq.answer: Despicable Me 3 (2017) is best described as Action, Animation, Comedy, Family, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Despicable Me 3 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Despicable Me Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
